targets.query:
from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> min()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Min")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> max()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Max")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "connection_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id", "connection_pair_id"])
  |> min()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Min")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "connection_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id", "connection_pair_id"])
  |> max()
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Max")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_sync" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Sync Duration")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["connection_pair_id"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["connection_type"])
  |> count()

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "signaling_to_connection_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "connection_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id", "connection_pair_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop", "_measurement", "_time", "_field"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Avg Signaling to Connection"})

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "connection_to_wg_handshake_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "connection_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id", "connection_pair_id"])
  |> mean()
  |> drop(columns: ["_start", "_stop", "_measurement", "_time", "_field"])
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "Avg Connection to WG Handshake"})

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_peer_connection" and r._field == "total_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "connection_type", "attempt_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id", "connection_pair_id"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Total Connection Time")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_login" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({r with _value: r._value * 1000.0}))
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> set(key: "_field", value: "Login Duration")

from(bucket: "metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "netbird_login" and r._field == "duration_seconds")
  |> drop(columns: ["deployment_type", "version", "os", "arch", "peer_id"])
  |> group(columns: ["result"])
  |> count()
